title: Product sync — 2026-05-10
text:
# Weekly Product Sync — 2026-05-10
Attendees: PM, Eng Lead, CS Lead

## Discussion
- Vantage Analytics escalated Billing problems again; churn risk flagged.
- Repeated ask for 'Usage-based billing tiers' across accounts.
- Eng notes Billing generates the most support load this month.

## Action items
- [ ] Evaluate 'Usage-based billing tiers' for roadmap.
- [ ] Investigate Billing performance regressions.
- [ ] Follow up with Vantage Analytics.
